title: LRRK2 thermal shift assay
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"7u2l5","text":"Thermal shift assay or differential scanning fluorimetry analyzes the effect of small molecules on the thermostability of a protein by gradual heat denaturation and monitoring absorption of the fluorescent dye SYPR Orange at 488 nm.\n","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"797la","text":"Thermal shift buffer","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"1h3un","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"c90sm","text":"20 mM Hepes pH 7.4","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"4cb64","text":"150 mM NaCl","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"b1t6f","text":"5% glycerol ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Prepare 4 µM master mix of protein in buffer (20 mM Hepes pH 7.4, 150 mM NaCl, 5% glycerol) and add 1:1000 dilution of SYPR Orange.
Aliquot 20 µL of the master mix into a white 96 well plate.
Add DMSO or small molecule binder with a final concentration of 10 µM.
Seal plate, mix well and centrifuge 30 sec at 500xg.
Place plate into MX3005P real-time PCR instrument.
Measure fluorescence with excitation and emission filters set to 465 and 590 nm while gradually increase temperature 3K/min during 71 cycles from 25 to 95°C.
creator: Verena Dederer
